mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT CALL_STM_NM FROM st_push_lnkd_sts_base_sum WHERE 1=1
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = #{lnkdDate}
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd')
ORDER BY CALL_STM_NM

SELECT DISTINCT USE_AIM FROM st_push_lnkd_sts_base_sum WHERE 1=1
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = #{lnkdDate}
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd')
ORDER BY USE_AIM

SELECT DISTINCT NOTE FROM st_push_lnkd_sts_base_sum WHERE 1=1
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = #{lnkdDate}
AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyymmdd') = to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd')
ORDER BY NOTE

SELECT call_id ,to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') ,to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyy.mm.dd')||' '||last_call_tm as endDate ,NVL(tgt_qty,0) AS tgtQty ,NVL(prg_qty,0) AS prgQty ,NVL(err_qty,0) AS errQty ,(NVL(tgt_qty,0) - NVL(prg_qty,0) - NVL(err_qty,0)) as notPrgQty ,push_msg FROM st_push_lnkd_sts_base_sum WHERE 1=1 AND to_char(lnkd_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') = #{lnkdDate} AND call_id = #{callId}
